title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Torrent Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Torrent Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
We at Torrent Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd are looking for an experienced Radiologist based out of Kolkata. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Torrent Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Torrent Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Torrent Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd!
